auditor: Chang Haylock Keetley Russell Che Liu LLP
economic_notes: Skatin Nations has a limited partnership interest in Tsetspa7 Forestry Limited Partnership (not recorded on balance sheet). Logging income of $224,680 reported. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership income of $333,842. Skatin Holdings Ltd. (100% interest), 1020376 B.C. Ltd. (33.3% interest), BCFN GRS GP Inc. (nominal interest). Five housing units under construction completed during the year.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three matters: (1) inability to verify tangible capital assets at historical cost affecting existence, completeness and valuation; (2) $1,000,000 note receivable carrying amount could not be verified; (3) interest in Tsetspa7 Forestry Limited Partnership not recorded on balance sheet. Restricted cash per notes is $233,353 but cash flow statement shows $350,213 restricted — discrepancy noted; balance sheet figure from Note 3 used. Short-term debt of $3,164,202 classified separately from long-term debt of $330,318. Annual debt service represents Social Housing Fund loan repayments only. No schedule of remuneration provided. OSR calculated as total revenue ($4,351,930) minus ISC ($3,048,146) minus FNESC ($298,145) minus FPCC ($72,025) minus CMHC ($43,173) = $886,421 approximate. Honoraria of $55,125 paid to elected officials but no formal remuneration schedule disclosed.
